original_image_tags: A single page of a typed memorandum from the Federal Bureau of Investigation. The document is printed on standard letterhead, now aged and discolored. A large "DECLASSIFIED" stamp in red ink runs vertically along the left margin. There are punch holes at the top center. The text is typed, with some handwritten notes and routing stamps.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A single scanned typewritten FBI memorandum page photographed upside down, with multiple faint red and blue archival stamps and handwritten notations; no photograph or illustration is present.*
